title: Gas report - Week 47
summary:
LNG
With Freeport confirming the uncertainty from last week, a slight influx of tonnage has opened up the ability for spot fixing - albeit with caveats on timing and delivery. But with such active period markets there is less spot requirements and a slight shift from the higher positioning costs has brought the index down a little. Delays in the Panama Canal continue to cause headaches.

children.title: LPG
children.summary: There has been a slight correction in rates this last week. After a few weeks of all-time highs the levels have begun to level out.
